title: select with full join...
poc: CREATE TABLE t1 (name TEXT, n INTEGER);
CREATE TABLE t2 (name TEXT, n INTEGER);
CREATE TABLE t3 (name TEXT, n INTEGER);
SELECT * FROM t1 FULL JOIN t2 USING (name) FULL JOIN t3 USING (name);
key_bug_features: FULL JOIN with multiple tables using the same column
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t1 (name TEXT NOT NULL, n INTEGER CHECK (n >= 0));
CREATE TABLE t2 (name TEXT, n INTEGER DEFAULT 0);
CREATE TABLE t3 (name TEXT UNIQUE, n FLOAT);
SELECT * FROM t1 FULL JOIN t2 USING (name) FULL JOIN t3 USING (name);
